articles.title: Chris Mason: Big moment ahead for Streeting to decide whether to go for it
articles.description: There is a big moment coming in the next 24 hours, for Sir Keir Starmer and for would-be challengers to the prime minister.

articles.title: Angela Rayner says she has been cleared by HMRC over tax affairs
articles.description: Rayner stood down as deputy prime minister in September 2025 after admitting underpaying stamp duty.

articles.title: Higher Europe air fares inevitable, says industry head
articles.description: Flying by air will get more expensive as oil prices remain high, says international industry body boss.

articles.title: Hezbollah support endures in south Lebanon as ceasefire fails to stop war with Israel
articles.description: Despite continuing Israeli attacks and occupation, many people in the south still believe the armed group is the only force capable of defending them.
